title: Citrus Herb Chicken Papillote
description: A flavorful and moist chicken dish baked in a parchment paper pouch, infused with the brightness of citrus and the earthiness of fenugreek.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together the orange juice, lemon juice, citrusy herb blend, and minced garlic.
Place the chicken breast in the center of a large piece of parchment paper.
Brush the citrus-herb mixture evenly over the chicken breast.
Sprinkle the chopped fenugreek leaves over the top of the chicken.
Fold the parchment paper over the chicken to create a pouch, and seal by folding the edges multiple times.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
